[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An anime-style girl with black hair and a surprised expression stands in front of a building facade with her arms crossed.

The main subject is a single anime-style person shown from about mid-torso upward, centered in the frame, with long straight black hair and bangs covering part of her forehead.

The setting appears to be outdoors or in a daylight exterior area, with a building background behind her: a horizontal structure near the top, dark slatted panels to the right, and lighter wall sections below. The light is bright and directional, creating clear highlights on her hair and clothing.

Visual Details: She has pale skin, large brown eyes with dark outlines, and an open mouth as if speaking or reacting. Her arms are crossed tightly across her chest. She wears a light-colored long-sleeve button-up shirt with a visible collar and buttons down the front, plus a dark skirt or long dark lower garment with pleated or layered folds. The character’s hair has glossy highlights and strands fall on both sides of her face and over her shoulders. The image includes small glowing particles or dust-like specks drifting in the air, most noticeable in the lower half of the frame. The camera angle is straight-on and slightly close, with her head near the top center and her figure filling most of the image.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a stylized anime girl facing forward with long black hair and arms crossed. She wears a light button-up shirt and a dark skirt against a building exterior background in bright daylight.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

[No readable text detected in the screenshot.]

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
